message.content:
{
  "analysis": "The current `/app/work/final_train.sh` run started a fastText supervised job (PID 6059) with character n-grams (`-minn 3 -maxn 5 -bucket 200000`) over 650k reviews. The ETA is about 1h43m, which is too slow and likely to create an oversized model. No `/app/model.bin` has been verified yet. I need to interrupt this run, kill stray fastText processes, clean stale artifacts, and run a faster word-only grid search on the existing 630k/20k split to find a configuration with validation accuracy above 0.62. Then I will train the best configuration on the full 650k data, quantize if necessary to stay under 150MB, evaluate on the local 10k test, and copy the qualifying model to `/app/model.bin`.",
  "plan": "1. Send Ctrl+C to stop the slow foreground script and training.
2. Kill any remaining fastText processes via `/proc` scan.
3. Verify no fastText processes remain.
4. Clean stale model/training artifacts while preserving `/app/work/train.txt`, `/app/work/test.txt`, `/app/work/train_aut.txt`, and `/app/work/val_aut.txt`.
5. Create a grid search script that trains several word-only fastText models on `/app/work/train_aut.txt` and evaluates them on `/app/work/val_aut.txt`, logging sizes and accuracies. I will use word-only configurations with varied dim/epoch/lr/bucket/minCount and include a softmax and an ova trial if feasible.
6. Start the grid search in the foreground with a bounded duration. After it completes or after enough progress, I will select the best validation accuracy and proceed to final training/quantization.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "C-c
",
      "duration": 2.0
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "echo '--- interrupted slow char-ngram run ---'
",
      "duration": 0.5
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "for p in /proc/[0-9]*; do
  cmd=$(tr '\0' ' ' < "$p/cmdline" 2>/dev/null)
  case "$cmd" in
    *fasttext*) echo "killing ${p##*/}: $cmd"; kill -KILL "${p##*/}" 2>/dev/null || true;;
  esac
done
sleep 3
grep -l 'fasttext' /proc/*/comm 2>/dev/null | head -5 || echo 'no fasttext procs'
",
      "duration": 8.0
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "rm -f /app/work/model_final.bin /app/work/model_final.vec /app/work/model_final.ftz /app/work/train_final.log /app/work/train_final.pid /app/work/eval_final.txt /app/work/quantize_final.log /app/work/eval_final_check.txt /app/work/model_aut2.bin /app/work/model_aut2.vec /app/work/model_aut2.ftz /app/work/autotune2.log /app/work/autotune2.pid /app/work/eval_aut2.txt /app/work/model.bin /app/work/grid_*.* /app/work/grid_results.txt
",
      "duration": 0.1
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "wc -l /app/work/train_aut.txt /app/work/val_aut.txt /app/work/train.txt /app/work/test.txt
",
      "duration": 0.2
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "cat > /app/work/grid_search.sh <<'SCRIPT'
#!/bin/bash
set -u
FSTEXT=/opt/fastText/fasttext
TRAIN=/app/work/train_aut.txt
VAL=/app/work/val_aut.txt
OUT=/app/work/grid_results.txt
: > "$OUT"

echo "=== grid_search start $(date -Iseconds) ==="

trials=(
  "-dim 100 -epoch 20 -lr 0.7 -wordNgrams 2 -bucket 100000 -minCount 2 -loss softmax"
  "-dim 120 -epoch 20 -lr 0.5 -wordNgrams 2 -bucket 150000 -minCount 2 -loss softmax"
  "-dim 80 -epoch 25 -lr 0.6 -wordNgrams 2 -bucket 80000 -minCount 3 -loss softmax"
  "-dim 100 -epoch 20 -lr 0.5 -wordNgrams 2 -bucket 100000 -minCount 2 -loss ova"
  "-dim 150 -epoch 15 -lr 0.4 -wordNgrams 2 -bucket 150000 -minCount 2 -loss softmax"
)

best_acc=0
best_name="none"
best_size=0
best_base=""

idx=0
for trial in "${trials[@]}"; do
  idx=$((idx+1))
  name="grid_${idx}"
  base="/app/work/${name}"
  rm -f "$base.bin" "$base.vec" "$base.log"
  echo "=== TRIAL $name args: $trial ==="
  "$FSTEXT" supervised -input "$TRAIN" -output "$base" $trial -minn 0 -maxn 0 -thread "$(nproc)" -seed 42 > "$base.log" 2>&1
  if [ ! -s "$base.bin" ]; then
    echo "FAILED $name" | tee -a "$OUT"
    tail -20 "$base.log" || true
    continue
  fi
  rm -f "$base.vec"
  size=$(stat -c %s "$base.bin")
  eval_out=$("$FSTEXT" test "$base.bin" "$VAL" 2>&1)
  acc=$(echo "$eval_out" | awk '/^P@1/ {print $3+0}')
  echo "$name args=$trial size=$size val_acc=$acc" | tee -a "$OUT"
  echo "$eval_out" | tail -3
  if [ -n "$acc" ] && awk -v best="$best_acc" -v cur="$acc" 'BEGIN{exit !(cur>best)}'; then
    best_acc=$acc
    best_name=$name
    best_size=$size
    best_base="$base.bin"
  fi
done

echo "BEST_NAME=$best_name BEST_ACC=$best_acc BEST_SIZE=$best_size BEST_BASE=$best_base" | tee -a "$OUT"
echo "=== grid_search done $(date -Iseconds) ==="
SCRIPT
chmod +x /app/work/grid_search.sh
",
      "duration": 1.0
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "/app/work/grid_search.sh
",
      "duration": 60.0
    }
  ]
}
